description_long: This gatehouse features a robust stone construction with a central arched entryway, flanked by two square stone pillars. Each pillar is topped with a modern, angular lamp fixture, providing illumination and a sense of security. The archway is constructed from weathered stone blocks, giving it a historic and sturdy appearance, while the double wooden doors beneath the arch are reinforced with diagonal bracing. The stonework is mottled with patches of moss or lichen, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The overall design is symmetrical, with the lamps and pillars mirroring each other on either side of the entry. The structure is solid and imposing, suitable for marking the entrance to a public or private urban property.
description: A symmetrical stone gatehouse with an arched entryway, double wooden doors, and modern lamps atop square pillars. The weathered stone and reinforced doors evoke a sense of security and historic character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched stone entry, double wooden doors, and both lamp-topped pillars clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the stone pillar and the profile of the lamp fixture, with minimal visibility of the arch.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the arch, doors, and both pillars with lamps from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the pillar and lamp.
attribute_entryway_design: arched stone doorway with wooden double doors
